case_title: DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES, A CALIF. GENERAL PART. vs. WINFIELD, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINFIELD, WILLIAM WINFIELD, MARGUERITE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 750 O'FARRELL STREET, #403, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WVS BACK RENT & DAMAGES. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNY'S FEES. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF TO RETAIN ANY PROPERTY IN PREMISES AFTER DEFT LEAVES, SECURITY DEP, LAST MONTH'S RENT & INTERESTS. PLTF TO PAY DEFT'S UPHOLSTERER COMPANY $200 AS DEPOSIT ON/BEFORE 7/14/95. OTHER TERMS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES, A CALIF. GENERAL PART. COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-10-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES, A CALIF. GENERAL PART. AS TO DEFENDANT WINFIELD, WILLIAM WINFIELD, MARGUERITE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES, A CALIF. GENERAL PART.

C.MITCHELL, JUDGE; M.HOLMES, CSR; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK. 10:37 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. A SETTLEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE THIS AGREEMENT FOR THE DEFTS' AND THE JUDGE'S SIGNATURES.
